prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Trace how TLS configuration flows from prometheus/prometheus through prometheus-common to the actual tls.Config used in HTTP clients. Find Go source files in both repos that define, validate, and apply TLSConfig for scrape and remote-write HTTP connections.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the prometheus-monitoring fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Trace how TLS configuration flows from prometheus/prometheus through prometheus-common to the actual tls.Config used in HTTP clients. Find Go source files in both repos that define, validate, and apply TLSConfig for scrape and remote-write HTTP connections.
